risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) and Energy Sector Management Program (ESMP) trust fund were canceled, and undisbursed IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) and Energy Sector Management Program (ESMP) trust fund were canceled because the project could not be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until the World Bank decides.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High across all assessment periods, indicating persistent governance fragility that continues to constrain project implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability has been rated High risk (substantial at approval, escalated to High), indicating the implementing agency (Ministry of Public Health) faces severe constraints in executing project activities under the current political environment.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability - Rating at Approval: Substantial, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_title: Significant Reduction in Project Commitment Due to Implementation Challenges
risk_summary: The Afghanistan operation commitment was reduced from $113 million to $60 million, reflecting the inability to effectively implement the full project scope under current extraordinary circumstances.
evidence_quote: the Afghanistan operation commitment of $113 million was reduced to $60 million

risk_summary: Macroeconomic and sector strategies/policies risks have escalated from Moderate at approval to High, indicating deteriorating economic conditions and policy environment affecting project viability.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic - Rating at Approval: Moderate, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High; Sector Strategies and Policies - Rating at Approval: Moderate, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High
